tt.intent: Typical-typical, 25C, nominal voltage. Use for typical-case PPA estimation.

ss.intent: Slow-slow, 125C, low voltage. Use for setup-time STA / sign-off / worst-case fmax. Note: sky130 SS is at -40C (where its FET threshold dominates); we relabel the corner's temperature to 125C to reflect the 7nm convention (hot-corner setup), while keeping the slow-corner numerics. Caveat documented in METHODOLOGY.md.

delay.summary: 130nm sky130 FO4 ~80-100 ps vs published 7nm FO4 6-8 ps; midpoint 12.5x

process_derate.summary: FinFET OCV-equivalent process derate; published 7nm sign-off 1.3-1.5x. Multiplied onto every delay-class quantity AFTER the delay factor. Applies to both TT and SS corners. Set to 1.5 (v0.4.0): mid-range published value. Tradeoff: derate=1.4 produces sharper STA but exposed detail-place legalization edge cases at area_factor=56; derate=1.6 was too conservative (~11% slow gap). 1.5 is the cleanest middle ground for the ±10% timing target.

area.summary: sky130 NAND2 ~3.75 um^2 vs ASAP7 NAND2 ~0.07-0.14 um^2; 27-54x published window. Recalibrated 40->56 (v0.4.0) based on measured gcd synth-stage area: opencell-7@40x reported 57.68 um^2 vs asap7 41.36 um^2 (1.395x gap); 56x = 40 * 1.395 closes the gap to ~0%. Linear factor sqrt(56)=7.483 (vs prior 6.325).

dynamic_power.summary: C*V^2 per-switch energy drops ~26x; per-workload dyn power ~5-8x

leakage.summary: 7nm RVT 1-10 nA/cell vs sky130 HVT 0.005-0.05 nA/cell; pragmatic 20x

input_cap.summary: sky130 INV ~2 fF input vs ASAP7 INV ~0.4-0.6 fF; ~4x

setup_hold.summary: sky130 FF setup ~50-80 ps vs 7nm FF setup ~5-8 ps; midpoint 10x. Also gets process_derate composed on top.
